item.name: 🔑 Smoke Login
item.description:
Minimal auth for smoke/full runs.
Prerequisite: python manage.py create_smoke_data

exec: pm.test('FAIL — 2FA enabled on smoke user', () => { pm.expect.fail('Run: python manage.py create_smoke_data --reset'); });
if (mine && mine.uuid) { pm.collectionVariables.set('store_uuid', mine.uuid); console.log('store_uuid:', mine.uuid); }
else { console.warn('No store — run: python manage.py create_smoke_data'); }
} else { console.warn('No products — run: python manage.py create_smoke_data'); }
pm.test('Is array or paginated', () => { const b = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(b.results !== undefined || Array.isArray(b)).to.be.true; });

exec: if (b.uuid) { pm.collectionVariables.set('store_uuid', b.uuid); console.log('store_uuid saved:', b.uuid); }
pm.test('Paginated or array', () => pm.expect(b.results !== undefined || Array.isArray(b)).to.be.true);
if (b.id) { pm.collectionVariables.set('product_id', b.id); console.log('product_id saved:', b.id); }
if (b.id) { pm.collectionVariables.set('order_id', b.id); console.log('order_id saved:', b.id); }
